title: Wandering Trader FANDOM Microblocks
description: Datapack allowing you to purchase a variety of microblocks from the wandering trader
body:
# **FANDOM EDITION**

This datapack adds a variety of microblocks to the wandering trader! When a wandering trader spawns, along with his normal trades, he will offer a variety of microblocks for purchase! Currently two editions available, with more planned for the future! Load **one and only one** pack into datapacks folder for use

The FANDOM EDITION of this pack contains the following types of microblocks: books, food and drink, household items and decorations, plants and flowers, gaming items, animal heads and plushies, PLUS heads from the following fandoms - Adventure Time, Star Wars, Legend of Zelda, Super Mario Bros, Pokemon, Disney, Muppets, Looney Tunes, Batman, One Piece, Hello Kitty, Sonic

As seen on the hardcore world of [Linkzzey](https://www.twitch.tv/linkzzey)

If you only want the decorative blocks, check out the [DECORATIVE Edition](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wandering-trader-decorative-microblocks)

Pack inspired by the Wandering Trades datapack from Vanilla Tweaks
